form.formComment: Won two starts back over 305m at this track. Last start she finished 3rd on April 16 over 305m at this track behind Fernando Lee beaten 1.5 lengths (17.78) in a Other. Draw likely to suit. Yet to win but has been in the money seven times from 11 starts off this box. Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 6 lengths over 400m at this track in a handy 22.91, beating Rusty Wheels. Safe beginner and will give a great sight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 6 lengths over 400m at this track in a handy 22.91, beating Rusty Wheels. Safe beginner and will give a great sight.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (17.80) over 305m at this track. Has run blistering time here with a 17.56 PB at the distance. Must include if she recaptures that form.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (18.17) in a Grade 2/3/4, finishing a 10 length fourth. Has three wins and five placings from 14 starts from the draw. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Won two starts back won at this course over 305m. Couldn't reproduced the effort last start when he finished 2nd on April 12 over 400m at this track behind Compton Copy beaten 1.3 lengths (23.35) in a Grade 2/3/4. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior he recorded a powerful 22.94 over 400m finishing second at this track. Can sneak a place again.
